sentence: go to en.wikipedia.org, search for a topic, and if a disambiguation page appears pick the first listed meaning, otherwise just read the article

workflow.name: Start Browsing
workflow.description: Begin by navigating to Wikipedia from a fresh tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: Search for Topic
workflow.description: Locate the search bar on the Wikipedia homepage and enter the desired topic.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
If a search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible
actions: Type 'a topic' into the search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia'

workflow.name: Handle Disambiguation
workflow.description: If a disambiguation page is encountered, click the first listed meaning to proceed to the specific article.
actions: Click the first link in the main content area

workflow.name: Read Article
workflow.description: The article page has been reached, either directly or after resolving a disambiguation.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/
If the current URL does NOT contain '(disambiguation)'
If a main article heading (e.g., H1) is visible
actions: Terminate: The article has been reached.
